title: Akamai Technologies Soars on Robust Cybersecurity and Cloud Sales
text: Cloud services and content delivery network (CDN) operator Akamai Technologies Inc. NASDAQ: AKAM had substantial profits driven by record security services in Q1 2023. Its legacy content delivery network (CDN) comprises more than 300,000 servers in over 135 countries enabling oceans of data, video and web content to stream with reliability and speed.

title: Akamai Technologies (AKAM) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Akamai Technologies (AKAM) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.40 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.32 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.39 per share a year ago.

title: AKAMAI REPORTS FIRST QUARTER 2023 FINANCIAL RESULTS
text: First  quarter revenue of  $916 million, up 1% year-over-year and up 4% when adjusted for foreign exchange* Security and compute revenue represented 57% of total revenue in the first quarter and grew 13% year-over-year and 16% when adjusted for foreign exchange* GAAP EPS of $0.62, down 24% year-over-year and down 18% when adjusted for foreign exchange*, and non-GAAP EPS* of $1.40, up 1% year-over-year and up 4% when adjusted for foreign exchange* Guidance raised for full-year revenue and non-GAAP net income per diluted share* CAMBRIDGE, Mass. , May 9, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: AKAM), the cloud company that powers and protects life online, today reported financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2023.
